content.description: A thematic map of North Carolina showing the computer assisted mass appraisal systems used by each county in 2018. The map is color-coded by system type, with a corresponding legend.
content.caption: CAMA System legend showing: ACS (3) - tan, AssessWeb (1) - brown, BI-Tek (26) - orange, Business Information Systems (1) - red, Cox and Company (17) - pink, DEVNET (2) - light pink, ECCO System (1) - light purple, In House (2) - white, Keystone (7) - purple, NCPTS (11) - light blue, Patriot Properties (3) - blue, Pearson Appraisal (3) - dark green, Thompson-Reuters (1) - light green, Tyler Technologies (22) - yellow.
